description_long: This is a vintage-style stereo sound system speaker with a rectangular, dark reddish-brown wood veneer cabinet. The front face features three circular speaker drivers of varying sizes, a square tweeter, and a control panel with a large knob and several labels, including the model 'S-90'. The left side of the cabinet shows some wear and chipping near the top edge, exposing lighter wood underneath. The right side is decorated with several colorful stickers or small photos, adding a personalized touch. The back is plain with a small black rectangular port or connector panel near the bottom. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of classic home audio equipment.
description: A vintage wooden stereo speaker with multiple drivers, a control panel, and personalized stickers on one side. The cabinet shows signs of wear and has a classic, robust appearance.
description_view_0: The left side of the speaker, showing a wood grain finish and a noticeable chipped area near the top front edge.
description_view_1: The front view displays three speaker drivers, a tweeter, a control panel with a large knob, and the 'S-90' label.
description_view_2: The right side features the same wood finish and is decorated with several colorful stickers or photos near the top.
description_view_3: The back is plain wood with a small black rectangular port or connector panel at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The front control panel displays the text 'S-90' in white, located at the bottom left; no other brand logo is visible.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are black mesh with a fine, regular grid pattern, covering the circular drivers and providing a subtle texture.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the bottom front, featuring a large round knob, several smaller buttons or switches, and printed labels including 'S-90'.
